title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)

title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: I Picked Up a No-Good, Useless Prince
titleEnglish: I Picked Up a No-Good, Useless Prince
titleNative: 断罪されたダメ王子、拾いました。
synonyms: I Groom A Stray Prince to Be Imperfect.
synopsis: Kuruhi, first prince of Gahama Kingdom, is the epitome of a spoiled brat with his arrogant attitude and behavior. After countless misdeeds, he is finally banished from the royal family and reduced to a commoner! The wandering, mud-covered former prince finds himself at an inn run by Emma, a girl who has a severe obsession with royalty drama. Emma is bewildered by the sudden appearance of her "Oshi", and determined to get him back on his feet, she embarks on a grand project! (Source: ComicGardo, translated)

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

tags.name: Royal Affairs

titleNative: 月と世界とエトワール
synonyms: La Lune, le Monde et une Etoile
synopsis: Yozora starts her high school days at the Moonlight Academy, a school that specializes in music. She is chasing after Umiyuri-sama, a girl with a heavenly talent for singing.

title: Kimi ga Iu ni wa Inu no Koi
titleRomaji: Kimi ga Iu ni wa Inu no Koi
titleNative: 君が言うには犬の恋
synopsis: "I just want to live my life listening to someone's orders and being praised..." Is that a sinful, unrealistic dream? Yet, that was the sole wish of ordinary high school student Akira Tamanoi. Days without dreams or motivation... One day, as punishment for being late, Akira is assigned to help the student council and meets the intelligent and beautiful student council president, Makoto Miyauchi. And then, something unexpected happens. Miyauchi constantly asks Akira for favors. "Please... thank you!" "You can't do it? You did well!" Without understanding the meaning of the comfort given to him by Miyauchi, Akira becomes completely engrossed in this suddenly realized dream... There he was, my wonderful master. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Rice Shoulder
titleNative: ライスショルダー
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Noppiki Naranu
titleNative: ノっぴきならぬ
synopsis: Seven years ago, Toraji met the most beautiful man he had ever seen. The time they spent together was as passionate as it was brief, and the man disappeared among the multitudes of Edo, the shogunate's capital. Toraji never learned his real name, or address, or occupation - but he never gave up on finding him again. Only, he didn't expect that when he did, the man would turn out to be the master of a high-class ryokan and restaurant, or that he would have a young daughter. How did this happen? Why did he run? Who is the child's mother and where is she? And most of all, will Toraji get a second chance to pursue the one great love of his life?

title: Perman
titleNative: パーマン
synopsis: From Birdman, a superman from space, he received a mysterious mask and cape. Wearing these, even a slightly clumsy elementary student can transform into Perman, a hero of justice! Rescue the weak, thwart the evil. Together with his three friends, Perman does his best every day to protect peace on Earth

titleEnglish: This Sweet Online Date is a Disaster!
titleNative: 甜甜的网恋翻车了！？！
synopsis: I was helping my sister win the heart of the game's top-ranked player, but it turned out to be a total disaster! I was even ridiculed by that gaming master!!! I guess no one can defy Murphy's Law! Just as the game was loading... Ding! Notice: Your husband is now online! (Source: Bilibili Comics) Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

titleEnglish: A Spring Breeze in a Wasteland
titleNative: 황무지의 봄바람
synopsis: Esen's death was only the beginning. After saving Cliff from her father's cruelty and being forced to become his wife, her life ended while giving birth to her enemy's child. But fate wasn’t finished with her. When she wakes up in the past with knowledge of the future, Esen is determined to rewrite her fate and change her relationship with Cliff, who was once her enemy and is now her greatest challenge. Can love truly rise from the ashes of hatred? (Source: Tappytoon)

titleRomaji: Kono Fukushuu ni Gal wa Iranai
titleNative: この復讐にギャルはいらない
synopsis: Nozomi Kashihara's parents were killed when he was young, and he has lived a life as an assassin without knowing any human warmth. Betraying the "family" that raised him, he now spends his days as a serious high school student without any friends. But when he helped Shingu-san, a gal in his class, from some delinquents, they begin to form a relationship. But Kashihara can't help but suspect that she might be an assassin targeting him...? (Source: Young Animal Comics, translated)

titleRomaji: Naruse wa Koi ga Shoumei Dekinai
titleNative: 成瀬は恋が証明できない
synopsis: Hiyoko is a second-year master's student in the Graduate School of Science and Engineering. She tends to be overbearing when in love and her boyfriend has just dumped her without a word. As she was feeling depressed about the breakup, Naruse, a smart guy in her lab, proposes an experimental relationship, saying, "I want to analyze your love life and figure out your problem..." But whenever Naruse gets close to her, her heart rate seems to blow up off the scale! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

This is a story of a slightly mysterious world created by four overlapping souls, each searching for something missing. (Source: ComicWalker, translated) Note: Originally self-published, the work was collected into two volumes and published by Kadokawa on 2023-01-27 and 2023-02-27.

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synonyms: Die legendäre Hexe wird als unterdrückte Prinzessin wiedergeboren
The Legendary Witch is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Kui-tan
titleNative: 喰いタン
synonyms: The Case Files of the Gourmand Detective
synopsis: "Holmes Agency" is a private detective office known as the "Big-Eating" Detective Office. Seiya Takano, who is known for have a huge appetite, gets assigned to this office as the new leader. Ryosuke Noda and Ryoko Izumi, both also having a big appetite work under Seiya. Murder, robbery, and kidnapping—many incidents occur around them. And the three solve each of the many cases in a most surprising way—their appetite results in marvelous speculations! They eat at themurder scene. They eat on the track. They even eat dog food! They keep on eating and eating, not even listening to the witness. Everywhere they go, they eat and eat and eat! And every time after finishing, the criminal appears. KUITAN is the words "Big-Eating" and Detective combined together. "Real Gourmet" plus "Real Mystery." The big-eating detectives are on the run, solving cases from their deep knowledge about food.

title: Kakeru
titleNative: カケル
synopsis: Daiba Kakeru has always felt like he entered a new world whenever he ran. Tiring himself out by running would cause something like a runner’s high and his five senses would go into overload, causing them to be hyper sensitive. He would be able to notice tiny details, hear ridiculously faint or far sounds and his body’s reaction time would be incredibly quick. Kakeru has had a crush on his classmate Natsume for months now and he's finally able to ask her out, only to find out that she ran away from home that same night. But Kakeru picks up on the subtle clues left behind and realizes Natsume was kidnapped. With the help of his resourceful science teacher Nezu Michiko, Kakeru uses his love as a motivation and hyper senses to track down Natsume.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Mugi Kaoru Futari
titleNative: 麦香るふたり
synopsis: Hugo, the grandson of Adan, struggled to reopen the bakery left by his late grandfather. However, he was not good at baking. Meanwhile, Adan's former apprentice, Sumino Mitsuyuki, comes by the store. Hugo decides to ask Sumino, who is not very good at baking, if he can help reopen the bakery, but it turns out that Sumino hasn't made bread for three years! Hugo is at a loss, but... how does the bread made by Sumino taste? (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

titleNative: 読心貴族～男女比1：99世界の悪役令息～
synopsis: Takayuki Shinohara (32), a librarian, gets caught in an earthquake, and finds himself in another world Apparently, he's now the son of a high-ranking noble, and he awakens just at the moment his own engagement being called off...!? With his mind-reading skill, he aims to leave his mark! A reincarnated-noble fantasy full of intrigue and adventure!! (Source: Shueisha, translated)

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!

title: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleRomaji: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleNative: あたしメリーさん。いま異世界にいるの……。
synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

title: Tetsunabe no Jan! R: Choujou Sakusen
titleRomaji: Tetsunabe no Jan! R: Choujou Sakusen
titleNative: 鉄鍋のジャン!R 頂上作戦
synonyms: Iron Wok Jan! R: The Summit Operations
synopsis: This year in major international competition of Chinese cuisine, the presumed winners are assured of victory. Indeed, a major sponsor is behind them. These are the ultra-powerful and ultra-wealthy 13 dragons, mostly linked to the Mafia. About this competition which is of prime importance, they control the judges, and put pressure on some competitors worrisome. However it was not counting on the arrival of a cook who fears no pressure. Known in the culinary world for his pranks and his eccentricity, he was once involved in the murder by poisoning. After disappearing for years in China, where nobody knew what he was doing, Jan is back!

title: Jeonjik Seongnyeowa Heungmagui Bimil Yeonae
titleNative: 전직 성녀와 흑막의 비밀 연애
synonyms: 元聖女と黒幕公爵の秘密恋愛
Secret Love Affair Between a Former Saint and a Dark Hero
synopsis: Ji-Yeon Kim, a college student on a leave of absence, was living an ordinary life until she found herself possessed into a romance novel her friend had shown her: The Saint's Flower. She became Iola, a girl who appeared halfway through the book. The world of the novel, centered around the saintly heroine and her romantic lead, was not meant for her. Still, she thought that becoming a character in a story might bring her happiness—just like the protagonist of a novel would. But everyone hurled hatred at her. They despised her. They called her Iola, the wicked woman who tormented the heroine—a false saint. But the truth was different. Iola herself was the true saint. Blessed by the divine, she returns to the very beginning. This time, she no longer needs her family, those who hate her, the title of Saint, or even the fiancé she once loved. She will walk a different path than before. "Even if this world tries to turn me into a villainess, I don’t care. I will survive and I will find happiness!" (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

synopsis: Rookie police officer Shiomi meets his senior officer, Chief Sano, on his first day of work. Shiomi initially feels uncomfortable around Chief Sano, who is always looking out for him, but one day he realizes that Sano is watching over him with warmth, and gradually opens up.Shiomi is drawn to the friendly and reliable Chief Sano, and his feelings grow stronger.Then, in his second year on the force, Shiomi's wish finally comes true and he becomes Sano's partner. However, his joy is short-lived when he receives the news that "Chief Sano is getting married. " (Source: Ichijinsha, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Mite Minu Furi wa, Tsumi desu ka?

title: Shogun
titleNative: ショーグン
synopsis: The story starts with Ogata Shinsaku, a homeless 17-year-old boy who was disowned by his father and head of a major company, Tatsumi Takaaki. One day, an old man appears and gives Shinsaku 100 million yen, urging him to use it as he sees fit, so he starts his own company to fight against his father's business empire.

title: Oshi to Deatte Genki ni Natta kara Ongaeshi, Shimasu!
titleRomaji: Oshi to Deatte Genki ni Natta kara Ongaeshi, Shimasu!
titleNative: 推しと出会って元気になったから恩返し、します！
synopsis: Doi started his career as a consultant with dreams and hopes. However, due to repeated stress, he lost his voice and was forced to take a leave of absence. "This might be the end of me..." In his despair, he mistakenly enters a soba noodle shop and meets Masato, the man of his dreams...! A super-beautiful store owner and a stressed-out office worker. If it's for the sake of my idol, even if it's in fire or water! A love romance that will blow away your stress! (Source: Kadokawa, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Snow Dome Town

synopsis: Ako has never left the snowy northern town she has called home. Ako's friend Tako asks her to help on writing the story of a novel with a snowy motif. The pair travel to Tokyo to finish the novel, and eventually learn the truth and test of the town. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

However, that tranquility, and their very relationship, is put to the test when they visit together Karasuma's homeland. Is there a warm nest and baby chicks is the future of the newlyweds, or...?

title: Millenium Mirage
titleNative: みれみら
synopsis: "Let’s make a child together!!" is what a girl who appeared out of the blue said. A pretty onee-sama and a cute girl, middle school student Takao Reiichi’s destiny is going to change in a big way since he met these two girls! Was their encounter a coincidence? Or something is bound to happen? Falling in love with the opposite sex and friendship?! Here comes another new love comedy!

title: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu You ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita - 3 Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki
titleRomaji: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu You ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita - 3 Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki
titleNative: 明日もいい日でありますように。～異世界で新しい家族ができました～三兄弟のほっこりご飯日記
synonyms: May Tomorrow Be Another Good Day: A new family was born in another world - Three brothers' heartwarming food diary
synopsis: Three brothers—Yuito, Haruto, and Yuuma—lost their mother in a traffic accident and were taken in by their father (who lived apart from her), spending their days enduring unreasonable violence. Just when they were on the verge of despair, given no proper meals and having no relatives to rely on—they were caught in a landslide and all three were reincarnated together into an isekai. A passing adventurer, Thomas, protected the three who had collapsed by the roadside, and together with his wife Olivia, who runs the eatery "Olive Tree," they welcomed the three as a "new family"... A warm isekai slow life spun by the beloved three brothers begins! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu you ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita—San Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki

title: Kumagurashi
titleNative: くまぐらし
synopsis: Kumada is an office worker who lives his life by avoiding all kinds of risks: "If you're prepared, there's no need to worry.'' "Better safe than sorry'' "A gentleman does not approach danger." One day, a bear suddenly appears in his house as he is enjoying his bachelor lifestyle. It's also a mysterious bear who does housework...!?

title: Kubinashi Seirei-sama ni Kuchizuke wo
titleNative: 首なし精霊様に口づけを
synonyms: A Kiss For the Headless Spirit
synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. Arvahany hates humans and has secrets of his own, not the least of which is that he has lost a considerable part of his powers. Teo has something he wants, and so he binds him with a contract to save himself, promising Teo to break his curse at the end of it, as a reward. But will the two be able to save each other? It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

titleNative: キスとか恋とか、NGなのに
synopsis: Rio and Yakumo are members of the idol group KEy, formed through an audition program. One day, while wishing to become closer to the cool Yakumo, an unexpected kiss completely changes their relationship! It turns out Yakumo was actually a super-devoted fan, absolutely obsessed and in love with Rio! Since confessing his feelings, Yakumo's romantic and lustful desires have only escalated. Seeing the special side he only shows him, Rio begins to waver between friendship and love... (Source: Overlap, translated) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

titleNative: ブラッドフレンド
synopsis: The violent horror manga is set in an old western-style mansion rumored to be haunted, on the outskirts of a town. A group of elementary school students gather at the mansion for a test of courage. One of the students, a girl who has been overcome with a terrible premonition, tells the group, "One of us will never come back." (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: 初見先輩は補欠
synopsis: "I wouldn't mind trying it with you, senpai." Hatsumi, a third-year substitute on the baseball team, flinches everytime at the slightly excessive skinship from Hinaki, a second-year regular. One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
titleNative: 遊遊じてき。
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)
